name: Northern Province (Sri Lanka)
description: Provincial flag of the Northern Province of Sri Lanka.
history: The Northern Province is one of the nine provinces of Sri Lanka, with its capital at Jaffna. The provincial flag follows the pattern of Sri Lankan provincial flags — a coloured field bearing the lion of Sinhala flanked by Bo leaves with a province-specific colour and emblem.

features.symbolism: Provincial flag of Northern Province of Sri Lanka
